summary.description: Implementation covers two areas: (1) skill delete functionality with server endpoint, client API, confirmation dialog, and post-delete cleanup, and (2) create-skill UI fixes including collapsible AI reasoning banner, markdown rendering in preview, and React error #60 fix. Additionally includes Skill Creator detection improvements and LeftPanel conditional display. Security, correctness, and UX are solid. Two low-severity findings and five informational items noted.

acCompliance.notes: spec.md was never completed (still template). ACs derived from commit messages and plan description.

results.evidence: DELETE /api/skills/:plugin/:skill endpoint in api-routes.ts:246-268 — uses resolveSkillDir() for path resolution, validates resolve(skillDir).startsWith(resolve(root)) to prevent path traversal. Returns 400 for traversal, 404 for missing, 403 for installed/read-only. Uses rmSync with recursive:true.
Client-side deleteSkill() in api.ts:125-127 — fetchJson wrapper with DELETE method, uses shared ApiError error handling.
Delete button in DetailHeader.tsx:67-95 — conditionally rendered with {!isReadOnly && onDelete}. Disabled during benchmark runs. Trash icon with hover-to-red effect.
Confirmation dialog in DetailHeader.tsx:71-73 — window.confirm('Delete skill X? This cannot be undone.') before calling onDelete().
Post-delete cleanup in SkillWorkspace.tsx:25-34 — handleDelete calls api.deleteSkill(), then refreshSkills() and clearSelection() from StudioContext. Error dispatches SET_ERROR.

Preview crash (React error #60) fixed in both CreateSkillInline.tsx and CreateSkillPage.tsx — split single div with conditional dangerouslySetInnerHTML+children into three-way ternary: write mode (textarea) | body content (div with dangerouslySetInnerHTML only) | empty (div with child span only).
AI reasoning renders markdown in both files — dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: renderMarkdown(aiReasoning) }} inside expanded section.
Collapsible banner: reasoningExpanded state (default false), chevron rotation animation, 'click to expand reasoning' hint. 300px max-height with scroll on expanded. Dismiss resets all three states.

LeftPanel.tsx:82-140 — Skill Creator status now has four-way conditional: installed+Claude (green), installed+non-Claude (dimmed 'Claude only'), not-installed+Claude (install prompt), not-installed+non-Claude (hidden).

Plugin cache detection fixed in serve.ts:40-53 and skill-create-routes.ts:207-225 — now traverses cache/<marketplace>/<plugin-name>/ (two levels deep) instead of flat scan. Install command updated to 'anthropics/skills/skill-creator'.

findings.title: renderMarkdown has no HTML sanitization
findings.issue: renderMarkdown() is a regex-based markdown-to-HTML converter that does not escape or sanitize input HTML. Content from AI reasoning (SSE response) and user-authored body text is passed through it into dangerouslySetInnerHTML. If the AI returns content with <script> tags or event handlers, they would be injected into the DOM.
findings.suggestion: Escape HTML entities (< > & " ') before applying markdown regex transforms, or use DOMPurify on the output.
findings.impact: Low — local dev tool, user controls their own content and AI provider. Self-XSS only. Defense-in-depth warranted.

findings.title: AI reasoning banner JSX duplicated across two components (~55 lines each)
findings.issue: The collapsible AI reasoning banner is nearly identical in both components. The preview body three-way ternary is also duplicated. Pre-existing duplication worsened by the fix.
findings.suggestion: Extract into a shared <AiReasoningBanner> component and a shared <MarkdownPreview> component.
findings.impact: Any future banner change must be applied in two places. Risk of drift.

findings.title: Delete endpoint returns 200, consistent with project style
findings.issue: DELETE returns 200 with { ok: true, deleted: '...' } instead of 204 No Content. Consistent with existing deleteHistoryEntry endpoint. No change needed.

findings.title: window.confirm used instead of styled modal
findings.issue: Delete confirmation uses native browser dialog. Functional but visually inconsistent with the polished Studio UI.
findings.suggestion: Future enhancement could use a styled confirmation modal.

findings.title: Layout 4 (self) skill deletion would remove entire root directory
findings.issue: When root IS the skill (layout 4), resolveSkillDir returns root itself. The path containment check passes (they are equal), classifyOrigin returns 'source', and rmSync would delete the entire root directory. Unlikely in practice (UI wouldn't normally trigger this), but theoretically possible.
findings.suggestion: Add guard: if (resolve(skillDir) === resolve(root)) return 403 with 'Cannot delete the root skill directory'.
findings.impact: Low probability, high consequence. Worth a simple guard.

findings.title: assembleBulkResult import is unused (pre-existing)
findings.issue: assembleBulkResult imported but never used. Pre-existing, not introduced by this diff.

findings.title: spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md are unfilled templates
findings.issue: All planning documents contain only template placeholders. No formal user stories, ACs, or tasks were defined.
findings.suggestion: For future increments, fill in spec.md with derived ACs even for informal work.
findings.impact: Process gap — no formal traceability. Does not affect code quality.

codeQuality.correctness: All features work as designed. Delete endpoint has proper validation chain (path traversal -> existence -> origin check -> delete). UI correctly gates delete button on isReadOnly and isRunning. The three UI bug fixes address root causes correctly. Skill Creator detection now properly traverses the two-level cache directory structure.
codeQuality.security: Path traversal protection uses resolve() + startsWith() — the standard Node.js defense. Origin check via classifyOrigin() prevents deletion of installed skills. CORS is configured for DELETE in both OPTIONS handler and sendJson. No auth — acceptable for local dev server.
codeQuality.performance: No concerns. Delete is a single rmSync. No unnecessary re-renders — handleDelete wrapped in useCallback with correct deps.
codeQuality.consistency: Follows existing patterns throughout: fetchJson for API, sendJson for responses, useCallback for handlers, dispatch for state. SVG icons match existing styling. LeftPanel conditional rendering is idiomatic.

recommendations: Add a guard to prevent deletion of the root directory in Layout 4 (self-layout) scenarios: if resolve(skillDir) === resolve(root), return 403.
Extract the duplicated AI reasoning banner (~55 lines) into a shared <AiReasoningBanner> component.
Consider adding basic HTML entity escaping to renderMarkdown as defense-in-depth.
Fill in spec.md with derived ACs for traceability, even for informal increments.
